A.text: is pulled inward toward the center

B.text: dissolves and mixes with the gas

C.text: ruptures, allowing the gas to escape freely

D.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

parsed.answer_value: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside
parsed.rationale: The outer shell remains intact and expands as the red internal gas expands, indicating that the shell does not rupture or dissolve, but rather maintains its structure while accommodating the internal gas movement.
